name: Resume Session
description: Resume the most recent session in the current directory. Automatically picks the last-active session.
useCases: go back to what I was working on

name: Resume Specific Session
description: Resume a specific session by its ID. Get IDs from claude-sessions --verbose.
useCases: go back to a particular conversation

name: Fork Session
description: Fork a session — creates a new session with full conversation history, but the original stays untouched. Great for branching experiments.
useCases: fork a session to a new tab

name: List Sessions
description: List all sessions with their IDs. Use to grab session IDs for --resume or --fork-session.

name: Print Mode
description: Non-interactive mode — sends prompt, prints response, and exits. Great for scripting and automation.
useCases: get a quick answer without a session

name: Override Model
description: Override the default model for a session. Use model IDs like claude-opus-4-6, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-haiku-4-5.
